title: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

conditions: At least one enchantable card in deck
notes: This event features two contrasting narrative outcomes. Choosing to enter your hole enchants a single card of your choice with [purple]Perfect Fit[/purple]. Choosing to resist removes 2 cards from your deck and adds a [red]Normality[/red] curse instead. The event requires at least one card in your deck that can be enchanted with [purple]Perfect Fit[/purple] in order to appear.
